who: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We send monthly renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
problem: missed contract renewals due to lack of reminders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 procurement managers with demo video
Join community forums for tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try manual entry and receive monthly reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save inputs as templates for easy reuse
Offer reminder schedule presets for convenience
Allow CSV import for existing contracts
Streamline onboarding process for new users
